parameters.name: ZipCode
parameters.description: US ZIP code for weather location

parameters.name: LatOverride
parameters.description: Optional latitude override (skips ZIP geocoding when set)

parameters.name: LonOverride
parameters.description: Optional longitude override (skips ZIP geocoding when set)

parameters.name: AlertTypes
parameters.description: Comma-separated NWS alert event names that trigger virtual inputs
parameters.defaultValue: Tornado Warning,Severe Thunderstorm Warning,Flash Flood Warning

parameters.name: VirtualPortStart
parameters.description: First VAPIX virtual input port number for alert triggering

parameters.name: WeatherProvider
parameters.description: Conditions provider: auto (NWS then Open-Meteo), nws, openmeteo

parameters.name: NWSUserAgent
parameters.description: User-Agent for NWS API calls (include your contact email per NWS policy)

parameters.name: OverlayEnabled
parameters.description: Enable VAPIX text overlay on video (yes/no)

parameters.name: VapixUser
parameters.description: VAPIX username for localhost API calls

parameters.name: VapixPass
parameters.description: VAPIX password for localhost API calls

parameters.name: MockMode
parameters.description: Return static test data instead of live API calls (yes/no)
